title: Hardening demo
steps: Start the local studio stack with docker compose
Validate scene manifests and local asset paths
Run Whisper subtitles for the vocal track
Run RVC voice conversion and lip-sync generation
notes: This pipeline is designed for fully local execution once Docker, ffmpeg, and the required model weights are available.
The runtime will create planning artifacts and a launch helper even when some prerequisites are missing so you can review the workflow first.
Voice services are enabled for this manifest because one or more scenes reference an RVC model.
ffmpeg was not detected, so the final assembly step must be run on a machine with ffmpeg installed.
No NVIDIA runtime device was detected, so GPU-backed services may need a cloud container or host GPU runtime.
Model directory not found at /home/runner/work/lumi-memory-learning/lumi-memory-learning/models; create it before launching GPU-backed services.
Input directory not found at /home/runner/work/lumi-memory-learning/lumi-memory-learning/input; create it before launching the studio workflow.
